proposed_relations.description: Offset dedicated bus lane treatment on Nostrand/Rogers corridor as part of the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Travel Lane Dedicated Bus Lane & Right Turn Lane: Offset bus lane allows buses to move quickly and preserves parking
Bus Lane is at right curb on Nostrand & Rogers between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd, and on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves

rationale: Evidence from CB8 slides page 7 explicitly describes the dedicated bus lane treatment on Nostrand & Rogers between Eastern Pkwy & Empire Blvd, and on Bedford Ave between DeKalb & Flushing Aves, which are part of the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project corridor.

proposed_relations.description: SBS bus bulbs/platforms at Nostrand/Rogers corridor stations as part of the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane.
Buses will not need to pull in and out of traffic.
Higher curbs on the SBS platform will allow for easier boarding.

rationale: Evidence from CB8 slides page 8 explicitly describes bus bulbs/SBS platforms at SBS stations (Empire Blvd, Rogers at Empire, Rogers at Clarkson, Nostrand at Empire) on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor as part of the SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Sidewalks at SBS stations will extend out to the bus lane.

proposed_relations.description: Off-board fare payment (pre-payment) treatment on the Nostrand/Rogers SBS corridor

evidence_refs.source_quote: Pay before you board by dipping MetroCard at sidewalk MetroCard machine or inserting coins at sidewalk coin machine

rationale: Evidence from CB8 slides page 4 describes pre-payment via sidewalk MetroCard machine, which is the off-board fare collection treatment for the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project.
